title: helichrysum rubicundum
intro: Helichrysum rubicundum, also known as the yellow or African helichrysum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its essential oil composition. The health benefits of helichrysum include pain relief, wound healing, and the reduction of inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for arthritis, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Helichrysum is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to affected areas.
